creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Thu Jul 19 22:45:14 2012
New Revision: 301195
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301195

Log:
  - fix plist
  - add license
  
  PR:     ports/170004
  Submitted by:   maintainer, cmt@burggraben.net
  Spotted by: pointyhat

Modified:
  head/print/gutenprint-foomatic/Makefile
  head/print/gutenprint-foomatic/pkg-plist

Modified: head/print/gutenprint-foomatic/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/gutenprint-foomatic/Makefile	Thu Jul 19 22:44:09 2012	(r301194)
+++ head/print/gutenprint-foomatic/Makefile	Thu Jul 19 22:45:14 2012	(r301195)
@@ -5,12 +5,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 #    $MCom: ports/print/gutenprint-foomatic/Makefile,v 1.1 2007/03/30 16:42:47 ahze Exp $
 
+PORTREVISION=	1
 PORTEPOCH=	0
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-foomatic
 
 MAINTAINER=	cmt@burggraben.net
 COMMENT=	GutenPrint Foomatic Drivers
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../print/gutenprint-base
 
 GUT_SLAVE=	foomatic
